page_content:
c. A grade of C- or better must be obtained to establish Credit-by-Exam.

If a student elects not to have the grade posted, a grade of W will be recorded. No course may be attempted more than once using Credit-by-Exam.

d.

e. Grades earned using Credit-by-Exam will be posted on the transcript as resident credit in the semester the examination was taken and used in computing semester and cumulative grade point averages. Such grades shall

Copyright University of Maryland 2025

be accompanied by the notation “By examination” as applicable.

f. The instructor must certify on the report of examination that copies of the examination questions and the student’s answers shall be retained in accordance with the University of Maryland’s Record and Retention Disposal Schedule.
